title: Brick's Fair Crafting
description: This project makes hoppers, armor stands, dispencers , cakes, golden apples, most redstone, and blast furnence easy to craft.
body:
This project makes hoppers, armor stands, dispencers , cakes, golden apples, most redstone, and blast furnence easy to craft.

Why cant you just make a comparitor/repeter with cobblestone? LIKE THE STUPID STONE IN THE CRAFTING IS NOT NEEDED. Also WHY DO I NEED TO SMELT STONE TWICE for a blastfurnence WHY?

Sorry about the yelling, but this is a VERY needed mod. You can put this in your modpack.

THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR 14 DOWNLOADS!
I made my first cent!

**have errors/need help. Join my Discord server**

_Isue tracker and ticket system in discord _
